semantic_text: Increase API call concurrency limit from 10 to 50 in index.js to enhance performance during VTT processing.

Refactor OneDrive extraction logic to improve reliability and error handling

Updated the extraction process to prioritize direct download URL extraction before falling back to browser-based methods. Enhanced error handling to provide clearer messages for extraction failures and implemented VPS-friendly options for the headless browser. This change aims to streamline the extraction workflow and improve overall performance.
Enhance configuration and error handling for WhatsApp client; update dependencies and improve README with Docker instructions
Update Dockerfile to use 'npm install --omit=dev' for production dependencies and add legal disclaimer to README regarding software usage and limitations.

Add authentication support for OneDrive access in OneDriveToR2Simple class

Implemented functionality to check for OneDrive authentication credentials via environment variables or command line options. Enhanced the authentication process to handle login redirects, including email and password input, and added error handling for failed authentication attempts. Improved logging to provide clear feedback on authentication status and user instructions for setting credentials. This update aims to streamline access to OneDrive resources and improve user experience during folder downloads.

Refactor OneDrive extraction logic to prioritize browser-based method

Updated the extraction process to first attempt browser-based extraction for improved file detection. Simplified error handling by removing redundant fallback logic and ensuring clear messaging for extraction failures. This change enhances the reliability of the extraction methods.
Enhance command-line start date handling to prevent multiple usages in PM2 R1 processing script

Enhance Arabic subtitle upload process in arabic_subtitle_maker.js by optimizing request handling and improving authentication flow. This update aims to further streamline the workflow and boost performance for subtitle uploads.
Add architecture diagram to README.md

Refactor language detection in VTT processing to utilize OpenRouter API instead of franc. Removed unused dependencies from package.json and package-lock.json, and updated language detection logic to handle API responses and errors more effectively.

Refactor download button detection in OneDriveToR2 class

Updated the logic for identifying download buttons to be more comprehensive, allowing for better detection of potential download elements on the page. Enhanced logging to provide insights into the number of detected buttons and their attributes, improving debugging capabilities during folder download attempts. Adjusted headless mode configuration for better debugging options.
Increase timeout duration for download wait function in OneDriveToR2Simple class

Implement batch processing and enhanced URL handling in OneDriveToR2Simple class

Added functionality to process OneDrive URLs from a text file, allowing batch downloads. Improved error handling and logging for both single and batch processing modes. Updated command-line options to support file input and refined user feedback for URL validation. This update enhances the overall user experience by providing a comprehensive summary of download results.
Enhance VTT processing by adding concurrency control with p-limit for API calls. Updated package dependencies to include p-limit, and improved error handling and logging during file processing.
Enhance subtitle-checker.js to apply corrections from analysis, including backup functionality and detailed reporting of changes made.
Remove legacy setup scripts and local subtitle checker implementation

Add validation for OneDrive folder URLs in OneDriveToR2 class

Implemented checks to identify OneDrive folder URLs and provide user guidance for downloading individual files. This enhances the user experience by preventing errors related to folder links.

Refactor caption processing in captionManager.js to improve error handling and user feedback. Enhance language extraction logic to better manage null values in the 'srclang' property, ensuring a more robust workflow for caption management.
Update Puppeteer configuration to use bundled Chromium and improve README with automatic fix scripts for browser issues

Add course details routing and enhance courses page interactivity

- Implemented router functionality to navigate to course details on click.
- Added a new route for course details in the router configuration.
